core_premise.summary: Harsh, grounded dark-fantasy world. Magic is dangerous and personal. Mana is finite. Slavery is legal and common. Actions have lasting consequences.

world.description: Fertile kingdom with rivers, forests, and rolling ridges. Trade flows along the great river.

magic.summary: Tag-based spell system. Spells have complexity, MP cost, and risk. Research and invention are possible but dangerous.
magic.key_rule: Mana is a finite personal resource that must be carefully managed.

demon_invasion.summary: Occurred 18 months ago. Rift sealed with elven help. Scattered warbands remain.

physiology.high_caste: Two arms, wings, intelligent, often spellcasters

human.summary: Dominant race by population. Pragmatic, bureaucratic, expansionist. Control most kingdoms and trade.

elf.summary: Reclusive, magically powerful. Helped seal the rift.

dwarf.summary: Reclusive mountain dwellers. Valued for machining and metallurgy.

beastkin.summary: Distrusted after short-lived alliance with demons.
beastkin.nekko: Human-like with animal ears/tail/claws. Frequently enslaved.

slavery.summary: Legal across all races. Two main categories.

types.red_tattoo: Prisoners / War slaves / Demon victims - Lifetime slavery. Enchanted mark glows steady red.
types.blue_tattoo: Indentured servants - Can buy freedom. Simple ink tattoo.

river_marches.daejon: Regional hub and major Adventurers’ Guild outpost

factions.adventurers_guild: Semi-independent mercenary network handling monsters and border threats
